name: Nelson Mandela University
description: Named in honour of Nelson Mandela. A comprehensive university blending academic and technology programmes across seven faculties in Port Elizabeth (Gqeberha), Eastern Cape.
faculties: Engineering, the Built Environment and Technology
apsSystem: NMU Applicant Score (AS) /600 — sum of top 6 NSC subject percentages (Life Orientation excluded); +7 bonus points for quintile 1–3 school applicants achieving 50%+ in LO
